column1: # Art sprint fetch/process plan (docs/art-sprint-spec.md). Tier F — private build only, never ships.
# mode: cover (crop to fill) | contain (fit + pad: flat card-bg for /cards/, transparent for icons) | raw (copy untouched)
# focus: center | top; optional @ZOOM suffix (e.g. center@1.5) punches the crop into the frame (VFX gifs)
# pick: auto (rank 1 goes straight to `out`) | shortlist (all ranks render to art/candidates/<asset_id>/ for the contact sheet)
# source: png | gif (frame_pct = % through the clip) | svg (rendered; falls back to same-name .png)
# register (docs/art-taste-pass.md): sticker|item|vfx|tcg|splash|icon — the pick's art class; art_lint enforces
#   class rules on effective picks (no icon on cards, item=>contain, gif=>frame_pct, unique source+frame).

# chained_reactions entered the pool with NO art rows -- all three ship
# portrait-less (null-safe governs) and need hunts at the art pass.
# Hunt notes: chain_fuse = linked/sequenced charges; careful_arrangement =
# cascade/chain-explosion VFX. quick_fuse and remote_detonator already
# bright_idea unblocked by the R36 discard op (draw 3, discard 1). REHUNT
# (vibe-check ruling 2026-07-20): both candidates confirmed weak by eyes (r1
# generic cheer, r2 reads as crying/panic -- the opposite of the card). Hunt
# term: a REALIZATION gesture -- exclamation, lightbulb, raised-finger --
# across the emoji/sticker sets. r1 stays placeholder (ships portrait-less,
# null-safe governs) until the hunt lands at the art pass. NO rank 1 row on
# purpose: an effective pick here tripped L1 (r1 is eager_to_help's pick) and
# L3 (icon register on a card slot) -- the dead placeholder was masquerading
# as a real pick. The rehunt's winner takes rank 1.

#     true_spark_knight's golden card: regular = the Style, golden = the

#   catalytic_conversion <- Dodoco's Marvelous Magic, promoted from its
#     power icon (which keeps it; same-referent register-crossing is legal).
#     The Jumbo statue is now EXCLUSIVELY the Burst meter badge.
# RED-PEN (both collisions missed by the ruling's premises, parked in
# art_lint PENDING_RED_PEN -- resolve at the red-pen session):

#   b. Marvelous Magic is ALSO spark_collection's effective r1 -- and
